cast.name: 多米尼克·莫纳汉 Dominic Monaghan

this_title: Wild Things with Dominic Monaghan Season 2
trans_title: 玩命全接触 第二季
introduction: Dominic heads to Kenya - the heart of safari country - to track down the incredible giant spitting cobra. Capable of blasting cornea-melting venom and delivering a bite lethal enough to kill more than 20 people, this might be his most dangerous mission to date. But the cobra isn't his only worry on this adventure. While on his search, Dominic and cameraman Frank have their closest call ever when a six-ton elephant charges and almost tramples them after they stop to help perform life-saving field surgery on the wounded animal.
chinese_title: 玩命全接触 第二季
foreign_title: Wild Things with Dominic Monaghan Season 2
